audience: Korean and Southeast Asian Gen Z (16-30), K-pop fans, boba culture, vibrant nightlife

sphere.concept: tiny 3D holographic K-pop heart charm with a lightning-bolt inset, not a ball, not a geometric shape
sphere.styleNotes: glossy neon cyan and magenta, bright rim glow, transparent background, high contrast against deep navy bg

trump.concept: K-pop fan lightstick with a star-shaped glowing top
trump.styleNotes: glossy 3D render, neon pink and electric purple glow, holographic accents, high contrast against deep navy bg

money.concept: boba milk tea cup with tapioca pearls and a translucent straw
money.styleNotes: 3D rendered, glossy plastic cup, condensation droplets, vibrant beige and brown, high contrast against deep navy bg

poop.concept: plush heart-shaped emoji character with a happy face
poop.styleNotes: 3D plush render, hot pink fabric texture, soft cute, high contrast against deep navy bg

cube.concept: retro neon cassette tape with magenta translucent shell and glowing label
cube.styleNotes: 3D render, holographic accents, isolated centered, transparent background

triangle.concept: five-point neon star with cyan-to-magenta gradient and bright rim glow
triangle.styleNotes: glossy 3D, K-pop neon, isolated centered, transparent background

background.concept: top-down view of a Seoul night-market alley with neon signs reflecting on wet pavement and scattered street tiles
background.styleNotes: neon-noir painterly, magenta and cyan reflections, low ambient noise
background.paletteHint: neon magenta, electric cyan, deep purple
